title: CISA flags VMware Aria Operations RCE flaw as exploited in attacks
summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has added a VMware Aria Operations vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-22719 to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, flagging the flaw as exploited in attacks. [...]

title: Paint maker giant AkzoNobel confirms cyberattack on U.S. site
summary: The multinational Dutch paint company AkzoNobel has confirmed to BleepingComputer that hackers breached the network of one of its U.S. sites. [...]

title: Facebook accounts unavailable in worldwide outage
summary: Social media giant Facebook is currently experiencing a massive worldwide outage, preventing users from accessing their accounts. [...]

title: Microsoft: Hackers abuse OAuth error flows to spread malware
summary: Hackers are abusing the legitimate OAuth redirection mechanism to bypass phishing protections in email and browsers to take users to malicious pages. [...]

title: Google Chrome shifts to two-week release cycle for increased stability
summary: Google Chrome will shift from a four-week to a two-week release cycle to roll out new features, bug fixes, and performance improvements more frequently. [...]

title: LexisNexis confirms data breach as hackers leak stolen files
summary: American data analytics company LexisNexis Legal & Professional has confirmed to BleepingComputer that hackers breached its servers and accessed some customer and business information. [...]

title: Compromised Site Management Panels are a Hot Item in Cybercrime Markets
summary: Compromised cPanel credentials are being sold in bulk across underground channels as plug-and-play phishing and scam infrastructure. Flare explains how analyzing 200,000 underground posts reveals a commoditized market for hacked site management panels. [...]

title: Amazon: Drone strikes damaged AWS data centers in Middle East
summary: Amazon has confirmed that three Amazon Web Services (AWS) data centers in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) and one in Bahrain have been damaged by drone strikes, causing an extensive outage that is still affecting dozens of cloud computing services. [...]

title: Star Citizen game dev discloses breach affecting user data
summary: Cloud Imperium Games (CIG), the game developer behind Star Citizen and Squadron 42, says attackers breached systems containing some users' personal information in January. [...]

title: UH Cancer Center data breach affects nearly 1.2 million people
summary: The University of Hawaii confirmed that a ransomware gang stole the data of nearly 1.2 million individuals in August 2025 after breaching its Cancer Center's Epidemiology Division. [...]

title: Android gets patches for Qualcomm zero-day exploited in attacks
summary: Google has released security updates to patch 129 Android security vulnerabilities, including an actively exploited zero-day flaw in a Qualcomm display component. [...]
